description: API reference for the Kestrel standard library — protocols, primitive types, collections, IO, and core utilities. Generated from the stdlib source by `kestrel-doc`.
rules: Kestrel uses Swift-inspired syntax with value semantics and monomorphized generics.
Operator overloads are written as protocol conformances (e.g. `Addable`, `AddAssign`); prefer using the operator over calling the method directly.
The never type is spelled `!`, not `Never`.
Initializers and subscripts are documented with `@name` directives so each overload has a distinct label.
